ingredients.item:
300g (10½oz) ground almonds
100g (3½oz) pistachio nut slivers or blanched pistachio nuts
100g (3½oz) caster sugar
finely grated rind of 2 oranges
finely grated rind of 1 lime
seeds from 6 green cardamom pods, ground with a pestle and mortar
pinch of ground cinnamon
150g (5½oz) unsalted butter, melted
2 packets of filo pastry (12 sheets)
ingredients.original:

ingredients.item:
200ml (1/3 pint) water
1 tbsp lemon juice
300g (10½oz) caster sugar
